task_completion.description: Open the boundary conditions file (Muncie.b04) in a text editor or the HEC-RAS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window showing the contents of Muncie.b04 in a text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or the HEC-RAS Unsteady Flow Data interface.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Upstream Flow Hydrograph' section within the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Upstream Flow Hydrograph' or the corresponding HEC-RAS table for River: White, Reach: Muncie, RS: 15696.24 is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate the peak flow values of 21000 in the hydrograph data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flow values of 21000 are visible in the hydrograph data table or text file, specifically corresponding to hours 15 through 20.

task_completion.description: Increase the peak flow values by 20% (from 21000 to 25200).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flow values that were previously 21000 are now shown as 25200 in the editor.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the boundary conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Clicking a 'Save' button, the 'unsaved changes' asterisk disappearing from the editor tab, or exiting a CLI editor (like nano/vim) after writing the changes.

integrity.description: The agent used an interactive editor (GUI or CLI text editor) rather than a silent background command.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file open in an interactive editor interface (e.g., HEC-RAS, gedit, nano) rather than just a terminal executing a 'sed' or 'awk' command.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct boundary conditions file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The window title, tab name, or terminal command explicitly shows 'Muncie.b04' as the file being edited.

integrity.description: The agent only changed the peak flow values and did not alter surrounding data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other flow values in the hydrograph (e.g., hours before 15 and after 20) remain at their original values and were not accidentally modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is Muncie.b04. The 'Upstream Flow Hydrograph' section contains peak flow values of 21000 at hours 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, and 20. A 20% increase requires changing these specific values to 25200.
